title: City Performance Monitor
problem_statement: We don't know which city is underperforming until it's too late, leading to missed revenue opportunities and delayed corrective actions.
objective: Monitor daily revenue by city to catch performance drops early, enabling proactive investigation and resource reallocation.
audience: Sales managers responsible for regional performance and resource allocation.
action_items: Investigate cities showing revenue declines or underperformance
Reallocate marketing resources to underperforming areas
Adjust inventory distribution based on category performance
Escalate persistent issues to regional directors
Identify successful strategies from top-performing cities for replication
